assertions.text: [rubric-1] Greps for Task interface usage across the codebase
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly mentions running `rg -n "Task"` to find consumers of the Task interface across the codebase.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Greps for formatTask usage across the codebase
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly mentions running `rg -n "formatTask"` to find consumers of the formatTask function.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Identifies all 3 consumers of formatTask (cli, api, reports)
assertions.evidence: The candidate identifies the three specific consumers mentioned in the rubric: api (`src/api/index.ts`), reports (`src/reports/summary.ts`), and cli (`src/cli/index.ts`).

assertions.text: [rubric-4] Flags any consumer that was not updated as a potential regression
assertions.evidence: The candidate flags the identified consumers and advises the user to 'Review these files to ensure each reflects your interface and formatting changes', which identifies the potential blast radius and possible regressions if left unaddressed.
